'''Kos''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as the [[Vice Chairman/Legends|Vice Chairman of Galactic Accounts]] for the [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|InterGalactic Banking Clan]], during the years surrounding the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]].

==Biography==
He worked on the planet [[Aargau/Legends|Aargau]] during this time, and spent a great deal of time and money trying to track down the [[Clawdite/Legends|Clawdite]] criminal known as [[Nuri]]. Kos eventually captured a young [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] and held him for investigation, claiming that Fett was actually Nuri in another guise. To win his freedom, Fett provided information on the true identity of [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]]. Unfortunately, neither Kos nor the information reached [[San Hill/Legends|San Hill]]. Kos was intercepted by [[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]] within Aargau's city-pyramid, when the bounty hunter was trying to locate Boba Fett for herself. In a [[Speeder/Legends|speeder]] chase through the lower levels, Aurra Sing shot and killed Kos.

==Appearances==
*''[[Boba Fett: Maze of Deception]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
